title: Protocol Pop-Ins: Privacy on Ethereum with Mike McCabe | 0xbow | Privacy Pools | Devconnect Special
description:
In this special episode of DevConnect, host Pooja Ranjan engages with Mike McCabe, product lead at Oxbow, to explore the evolving landscape of privacy solutions in the Ethereum ecosystem. The discussion highlights Oxbow's mission to make privacy the default on Ethereum, the challenges of building privacy projects, and the significance of recent EIP proposals.
